## Proposed Algorithmic Approach {.nav-proposed}

1. Learn *Pareto-optimal* Policy Set using *Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning*.
2. Actively request *similarity queries* from the user to learn similarity embedding $\vec{e}$.
3. Use $\vec{e}$ to rapidly find human-preferred behavior using PBL with regret minimization.

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: -1em;">
![](images/qual-method.svg){width="100%"}
</div>
